name: copilot-commit
description: Generate structured, semantic commit messages using GitHub Copilot's language models

copilotCommit.defaultModel.markdownDescription:
Default Copilot model family to use for commit generation. Set to `auto` to use the first available model.

[$(sparkle) Select a model interactively](command:copilotCommit.selectModel)

copilotCommit.useCurrentChatModel.description: Use the current model selected in Copilot Chat. When enabled, this overrides the defaultModel setting.

markdownEnumDescriptions:
Structured format: `<type>(<scope>): <summary>` with optional body

---

**Example output:**

> feat(auth): add login endpoint with JWT validation
>
> \- Implement token refresh flow
>
> \- Add password hashing with bcrypt

Clear, human-readable description without strict conventions

---

**Example output:**

> Add login endpoint with JWT token validation
>
> Implements secure authentication using JSON Web Tokens with refresh support.

Single concise line, perfect for small changes

---

**Example output:**

> add login endpoint with jwt validation

Summary with optional issue/PR references and footers

---

**Example output:**

> Add login endpoint with JWT validation
>
> Implement secure auth flow with token refresh and session management.
>
> Closes #42

Conventional commits with emoji prefixes for visual scanning

---

**Example output:**

> ✨ feat(auth): add login endpoint with JWT validation
>
> \- Implement token refresh flow
>
> \- Add password hashing with bcrypt

Multi-paragraph with full context, reasoning, and impact analysis

---

**Example output:**

> Add login endpoint
>
> The app lacked user authentication, blocking all protected routes from functioning.
>
> Adds a /login POST endpoint using JWT with 15-minute expiry and refresh tokens stored in httpOnly cookies.
>
> Impacts: middleware auth check, user session table, rate limiting.

Full gitmoji spec with 70+ emojis mapped to change types

---

**Example output:**

> ✨ add login endpoint with jwt validation
>
> \- Add JWT token generation and refresh
>
> \- Add bcrypt password hashing

Angular commit convention with BREAKING CHANGE and footer support

---

**Example output:**

> feat(auth): add login endpoint
>
> Implement JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens and password hashing using bcrypt.
>
> Closes #42

name.description: Display name for this prompt template

template.description: The prompt template. Include 'Diff:' at the end where the diff will be appended.

copilotCommit.customPrompts.description: Custom prompt templates for commit messages. Add your own styles here.

copilotCommit.showModelInStatusBar.description: Show the current model indicator in the status bar

scripts.release:prepare-local: npm run compile && npm test && npm run changelog:generate
